long.steadyModerate: Long run — steady, moderate effort at {{pace}}/km

easy.aroundRace: Easy run — keep it light around your race

tempo.oneHard: Tempo run — {{pace}}/km, your one hard session this week
tempo.goalPace: Tempo — at goal race pace {{pace}}/km, steady
tempo.goalPaceShort: Tempo — short, at goal race pace {{pace}}/km

intervals.strength: Strength — {{reps}}x{{dist}} at goal pace minus {{offset}}s ({{pace}}/km) + 1km jog recovery

runwalk.long: Long run/walk — run {{runMin}} min / walk {{walkMin}} min, conversational
runwalk.short: Run/walk — run {{runMin}} min / walk {{walkMin}} min, conversational
runwalk.shortTaper: Run/walk — run {{runMin}} min / walk {{walkMin}} min, short and relaxed

cross: Optional cross-training — {{mins}} easy bike, swim or elliptical (skip if tired)
raceday: Race Day — {{km}}km{{elev}}! Everything you trained for.

steps.stretch: 5 min of gentle stretching — calves, quads, hamstrings, hips.

intervals.warmup: 10–15 min easy jogging, finishing with a few relaxed strides.
intervals.cooldown: 5–10 min very easy jog to bring the heart rate down.
intervals.workoutGeneric: Repeats at {{pace}} with easy jog recoveries between them.
intervals.workoutGenericNoPace: Repeats with easy jog recoveries between them.

tempo.workoutKm: ~{{km}} km at {{pace}} — comfortably hard: controlled, but you couldn't hold a chat.
tempo.workoutKmNoPace: ~{{km}} km — comfortably hard: controlled, but you couldn't hold a chat.
tempo.workoutNoKm: The main block at {{pace}} — comfortably hard: controlled, but you couldn't hold a chat.
tempo.workoutNoKmNoPace: The main block — comfortably hard: controlled, but you couldn't hold a chat.

long.start: Ease into it — the first 10 min should feel almost too slow.
long.mainRatio: Settle into run {{run}} min / walk {{walk}} min for the full distance, conversational throughout.
long.mainPace: Hold a relaxed, conversational effort around {{pace}} the whole way.
long.mainNoPace: Hold a relaxed, conversational effort the whole way.
long.fuel: Drink regularly and take carbs every 30–40 min — practice your race-day fuelling.

walk.mainRatio: Alternate run {{run}} min / walk {{walk}} min — keep every run segment conversational.
walk.activity: Brisk walk or low-impact cross-training — easy effort, no pounding.

race.before: Arrive early. 10 min easy jog and a few strides, then keep warm.
race.raceTarget: Start controlled — target {{pace}}; the first kilometres should feel easy.
race.raceNoTarget: Start controlled; the first kilometres should feel easy.
race.after: Keep walking a few minutes, refuel, and celebrate.

steps.other: Optional cross-training — bike, swim or elliptical at an easy effort. Skip it if you're tired.

easy.runPace: Fully conversational — around {{pace}}; walking breaks are fine.
easy.runNoPace: Fully conversational; walking breaks are fine.
easy.finish: A few minutes of walking, then light stretching.
